title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Manappuram Finance Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Manappuram Finance Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Manappuram Finance Global Group in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Manappuram Finance Global Group:
Manappuram Finance Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance Global Group!
